dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sam! I'm passing the supermarket now. Do you need anything?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Oh, perfect! Can you bring some floor cleaner, and pasta for dinner? I'm cleaning the apartment.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Of course. Why are you cleaning? What's the occasion?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I have important news! I'll tell you when you come home.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Now I'm curious! Okay, I'll be there in an hour.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Great! I also cleaned the desks and the table. Everything looks perfect.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: This sounds like very important news. See you soon!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I'm home! Here's the pasta. So, what's your news?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: She passed the exam! My sister passed her doctor exam yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's wonderful! We shall celebrate! I'll cook dinner for everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Really? That's a great offer. What will you cook?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Pasta with my new sauce. But there's a problem, I broke the big glass serving bowl this morning.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Don't worry. We can use that blue bowl on the table.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect! Can you call your sister? Dinner will be ready in two hours.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'll call her now. She'll be so happy!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The dinner smells wonderful! My sister will be here soon.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I hope she likes it. I wish I had more time to prepare.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It will be perfect. Oh, she's here! Come in!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Congratulations! Please, sit down. Dinner is ready.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Let's share this meal together. Here's to your success!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Did you like it? I can bring more pasta if you want.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It's delicious! This is the best celebration dinner. Thank you for cooking.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I'm happy you enjoyed it. This day will be a great story to remember!
